TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Skënder Sallaku ryax 25, 1 byacing 1935 kawas qu hintgan nya ru tehuk ryax 11, 2 byacing kawas 2014 qu hinqilan nya, 79 kawas qu qinnxan nya. hiya ga Albania blaq balay psyaqan pgeki na squliq. lalu nya ga hcyux naha sr'xun ska Albania . minnagal sa pciriq squ pkyap squ Albania, hiya wal magal champion. sasan nqu ryax 11, 2 byacing, ru kawas te 2014 lga, wayal mhuqil squ Albania Tirane la. mnaki squ bih nya kwara qu qutux ngasal nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: s~ɕk*n*er s~ɕallaku rjax **, * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ **** kawas~ɕ qu ħintɣan nja ru teħuk rjax **, * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ **** qu ħinqilan nja, ** kawas~ɕ qu qinnxan nja. ħija ɣa alβania βlaq βalaj ps~ɕjaqan pɣeki na s~ɕquliq. lalu nja ɣa ħʦ~ʨjux naħa s~ɕrʔxun s~ɕka alβania . minnaɣal s~ɕa pʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu pkjap s~ɕqu alβania, ħija wal maɣal ʦ~ʨħampion. s~ɕas~ɕan nqu rjax **, * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, ru kawas~ɕ te **** lɣa, wajal mħuqil s~ɕqu alβania tirane la. mnaki s~ɕqu βiħ nja kwara qu qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Skënder Sallaku ryax 25, 1 byacing 1935 kawas qu hintgan nya ru tehuk ryax 11, 2 byacing kawas 2014 qu hinqilan nya, 79 kawas qu qinnxan nya. hiya ga Albania blaq balay psyaqan pgeki na squliq. lalu nya ga hcyux naha sr'xun ska Albania . minnagal sa pciriq squ pkyap squ Albania, hiya wal magal champion. sasan nqu ryax 11, 2 byacing, ru kawas te 2014 lga, wayal mhuqil squ Albania Tirane la. mnaki squ bih nya kwara qu qutux ngasal nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
